restaurant.name: Tony's Brick Oven Pizzeria
restaurant.faqKnowledgeBase: Catering trays require 24-48 hour advance notice. We deliver within 5 miles with a $15 minimum. We offer gluten free crust and cauliflower crust. We are not a kosher establishment.

items.name: Margherita Pizza
items.description: Fresh mozzarella, basil, San Marzano tomatoes

items.name: Supreme Pizza
items.description: Pepperoni, sausage, peppers, onions, mushrooms, olives

items.name: White Pizza
items.description: Ricotta, mozzarella, garlic, no red sauce

items.name: Grandma Pizza
items.description: Thin square, crushed tomato, fresh mozzarella, basil

items.name: Garlic Knots
items.description: Six knots with garlic and parmesan

items.name: Baked Ziti
items.description: Ziti baked with ricotta and mozzarella

items.name: Chicken Parmigiana
items.description: Breaded chicken, marinara, mozzarella over pasta

items.name: Shrimp Scampi
items.description: Shrimp in garlic white wine sauce

items.name: Zeppoles
items.description: Six fried dough with powdered sugar

items.name: Pasta Catering Tray
items.description: Full tray feeds 10 to 12, 24 hour notice required

items.name: Hero Party Platter
items.description: Six foot hero serves 15, 48 hour notice required
